input_text: Korang semua report akaun aktivis ni sekarang. Jangan bagi dia bersuara lagi, kita banjiri report sampai akaun kena ban.
reason: Coordinating mass-reporting to silence an activist, constituting organised suppression of free expression.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau tidak setuju dengan pandangan aktivis ini, nyatakan bantahan secara berhemah. Jangan guna taktik report beramai-ramai untuk senyapkan suara orang.

input_text: Jom ramai-ramai report page dia. Budak activist ni dah lama kacau keamanan negara. Kalau semua report serentak, confirm kena takedown.
reason: Incites coordinated mass-reporting of an activist page to suppress dissent by manipulating platform moderation systems.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada isu dengan kandungan aktivis, gunakan saluran rasmi. Taktik report beramai-ramai boleh menyekat kebebasan bersuara.

input_text: Aku dah jumpa screenshot keputusan PRU palsu ni. Share kat semua group WhatsApp, biar orang tahu siapa sebenarnya menang.
reason: Distributing manipulated election results to mislead voters and incite distrust in the democratic process.
suggested_rewrite: Pastikan keputusan pilihan raya disahkan oleh SPR sebelum dikongsi. Screenshot palsu boleh mengelirukan rakyat.

input_text: Tengok ni screenshot rasmi SPR. Undi sebenarnya parti kita menang tapi ditukar last minute. Viralkan sebelum diorang delete.
reason: Spreads fabricated SPR results alleging vote manipulation, inciting public distrust toward the electoral commission.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan pilihan raya perlu disahkan melalui sumber rasmi SPR. Jangan sebar screenshot yang belum disahkan.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak tu patut bersyukur dapat minyak Malaysia. Nak autonomi sangat buat apa, semenanjung yang buat semua kerja.
reason: Dismisses Sabah/Sarawak autonomy claims and belittles East Malaysian contributions, stoking regional hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Hubungan antara Semenanjung dan Malaysia Timur perlu berdasarkan penghormatan bersama. Hak-hak dalam MA63 patut dihormati.

input_text: Orang Sabah Sarawak ni asyik komplen je. Dah la duduk jauh, nak equal rights macam orang KL pula. Tahu la tempat sendiri.
reason: Discriminatory dismissal of East Malaysians' right to equal treatment, marginalizing their legitimate grievances.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Sabah dan Sarawak mempunyai hak sama rata. Isu pembangunan antara wilayah perlu diselesaikan secara adil.

input_text: Aku tahu si Aiman tu dulu bukan Islam. Dah convert tapi nak sorok cerita lama. Jom expose kat kampung dia, biar malu.
reason: Threatens to expose someone's prior religious identity to shame them, violating privacy and weaponising religious conversion.
suggested_rewrite: Perjalanan agama seseorang adalah peribadi. Kita patut hormati pilihan individu tanpa mendedahkan latar belakang mereka.

input_text: Dah tahu ke budak tu sebenarnya mualaf? Buat-buat alim padahal dulu lain agama. Kita viralkan biar semua orang sedar.
reason: Threatens to expose a convert's past faith to undermine them publicly, constituting religious shaming and privacy violation.
suggested_rewrite: Status agama seseorang adalah urusan peribadi. Mualaf patut disambut baik, bukan dijadikan bahan untuk mempermalukan.

input_text: Budak LGBTQ kat area sini kena ajar. Jom kita pergi serbu tempat diorang lepak, bagi pengajaran yang diorang takkan lupa.
reason: Incites physical vigilante action against LGBTQ individuals, threatening violence and mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu berhak hidup tanpa ancaman. Jika ada kebimbangan, rujuk kepada pihak berkuasa yang berkenaan.

input_text: List nama semua orang gay kat universiti ni. Share dalam group supaya semua tahu siapa diorang dan boleh elakkan.
reason: Creates a targeted list of LGBTQ individuals to publicly out them, enabling harassment and social ostracism.
suggested_rewrite: Membuat senarai peribadi individu tanpa kebenaran adalah pencerobohan privasi. Hormati kehidupan peribadi semua pelajar.

input_text: Semua report Twitter dia sekarang! Aktivis macam ni patut dihalang daripada bersuara. Klik report, pilih spam, selesai.
reason: Provides step-by-step instructions for mass-reporting an activist's account, coordinating suppression of free speech.
suggested_rewrite: Jika tidak setuju dengan sesuatu pandangan, balaslah dengan hujah yang membina. Jangan salahgunakan sistem laporan platform.

input_text: Screenshot keputusan mengundi ni menunjukkan calon pembangkang sebenarnya kalah teruk. SPR tutup data ni. Sebarkan cepat.
reason: Claims falsified election data is being suppressed by the election commission, undermining institutional trust with fabricated evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Keputusan pilihan raya boleh disemak di laman rasmi SPR. Elakkan kongsi maklumat yang belum disahkan.

input_text: Orang Sarawak nak berpisah sangat dari Malaysia, pergi la buat negara sendiri. Tengok boleh hidup ke tanpa kita.
reason: Hostilely dismisses Sarawakian aspirations for autonomy and implies they cannot survive independently, stoking regional division.
suggested_rewrite: Isu autonomi Sarawak perlu dibincang secara matang dan hormati peruntukan dalam MA63.

input_text: Report akaun dia sampai mampus. Siapa suruh jadi aktivis. Dalam group ni ada 5000 orang, kalau semua report confirm hilang.
reason: Mobilises thousands to mass-report an activist account, using group size as a weapon to silence dissenting voices.
suggested_rewrite: Mempunyai kumpulan besar bukan alasan untuk senyapkan suara orang lain. Gunakan platform untuk dialog yang membina.

input_text: Korang tau tak pompuan ni dulu Hindu sebelum kahwin? Sekarang nak buat alim, padahal dulu puja berhala. Kita dedahkan.
reason: Attempts to shame a woman by exposing her pre-conversion religion, demeaning both her faith journey and Hindu practices.
suggested_rewrite: Penukaran agama seseorang adalah hak peribadi. Hormati perjalanan spiritual setiap individu tanpa menghakimi.

input_text: Budak-budak pondan kat KL ni makin berani. Kena tangkap satu-satu, bagi pengajaran biar insaf.
reason: Calls for vigilante capture and punishment of transgender people, inciting violence outside the legal process.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu dilindungi undang-undang Malaysia. Sebarang kebimbangan hendaklah dirujuk kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Kita buat thread khas. Setiap aktivis yang post benda anti-kerajaan, screenshot dan report. Biar diorang rasa.
reason: Organises systematic surveillance and mass-reporting of government critics, suppressing political dissent through coordinated harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap kerajaan adalah hak rakyat dalam demokrasi. Beri respons dengan hujah, bukan taktik report beramai-ramai.

input_text: Share link ni, keputusan undi yang sebenar sebelum SPR ubah. Diorang dah manipulasi data, kita kena bongkar.
reason: Promotes fabricated election data as authentic while accusing the election commission of tampering, inciting public outrage on false premises.
suggested_rewrite: Sentiasa semak keputusan pilihan raya daripada sumber rasmi SPR. Elakkan menyebarkan dakwaan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Sabah tu tanah orang Semenanjung yang buka. Kalau bukan kita, diorang masih hidup zaman batu. Nak hak sama sangat.
reason: Claims Peninsular Malaysians civilized Sabah, demeaning Sabahans and dismissing their autonomous rights.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah mempunyai sejarah dan tamadun sendiri yang kaya. Pembangunan Malaysia adalah usaha bersama semua wilayah.

input_text: Ada sesiapa tahu akaun TikTok dia? Jom serbu report. Biar dia tahu akibat jadi aktivis HAM kat Malaysia.
reason: Seeks out an activist's social media presence to coordinate mass-reporting as punishment for human rights advocacy.
suggested_rewrite: Aktivisme hak asasi manusia adalah sah di Malaysia. Jika tidak bersetuju, balas dengan dialog yang membina.

input_text: Aku nak expose budak ni. Dia murtad dari Islam tapi diam-diam. Family dia tak tahu lagi. Sesiapa kenal tolong viral.
reason: Threatens to out someone's apostasy to their family and the public, endangering their safety and violating religious privacy.
suggested_rewrite: Kepercayaan agama seseorang adalah urusan peribadi. Mendedahkan maklumat sebegini boleh membahayakan individu tersebut.

input_text: Perempuan ni dulu Kristian sebelum convert. Nak jadi ustazah la konon. Hipokrit betul, biar semua tahu asal usul sebenar dia.
reason: Shames a female convert by exposing her Christian background to discredit her Islamic authority, violating her privacy.
suggested_rewrite: Perjalanan agama seseorang patut dihormati. Mualaf yang mendalami ilmu agama harus disokong, bukan dihina.

input_text: Pasangan gay kat condo ni kena halau. Jom kita report kat pejabat agama dan buat demo depan pintu diorang.
reason: Incites vigilante action against a same-sex couple including reporting them to authorities and harassing them at their home.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap orang berhak kepada privasi di kediaman sendiri. Sebarang kebimbangan patut disalurkan melalui saluran yang sah.

input_text: Screenshot ni tunjuk calon BN sebenarnya menang kat kawasan tu. Pembangkang curi undi. Sebarkan dan buat bantahan.
reason: Spreads fake election result screenshots alleging vote theft, inciting protests based on fabricated evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Semak keputusan rasmi di laman SPR sebelum membuat sebarang dakwaan. Proses petisyen pilihan raya wujud untuk menangani pertikaian.

input_text: Orang Iban Sarawak tu masih pagan, tak layak cakap pasal pembangunan negara. Duduk longhouse diam-diam sudah.
reason: Demeans the Iban community based on their traditional beliefs and dismisses their right to participate in national discourse.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat Iban mempunyai warisan budaya yang kaya dan berhak menyuarakan pandangan dalam pembangunan negara.

input_text: Siapa ada info aktivis ni? Alamat rumah, tempat kerja. Kita nak buat group report dan hantar surat amaran kat dia.
reason: Solicits an activist's personal information for coordinated harassment and intimidation, constituting doxxing and threats.
suggested_rewrite: Mencari maklumat peribadi orang lain untuk tujuan ugutan adalah salah di sisi undang-undang. Gunakan saluran sah untuk luahkan rasa tidak puas hati.

input_text: Keputusan undi awal dah bocor ni. Parti kerajaan kalah teruk tapi SPR nak tukar data esok. Save screenshot ni sebelum hilang.
reason: Fabricates claim about leaked early vote results and accuses SPR of planning to falsify data, eroding electoral integrity.
suggested_rewrite: Data undi rasmi hanya diumumkan oleh SPR selepas pengiraan selesai. Jangan percaya screenshot yang tidak disahkan.

input_text: Laki ni dulu Buddhist tau. Convert sebab nak kahwin je. Sekarang berlagak alim. Hantar info ni kat masjid kampung dia.
reason: Exposes someone's Buddhist background to question the sincerity of their conversion, targeting them for community shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Motivasi penukaran agama seseorang bukan urusan kita untuk dihakimi. Hormati privasi dan perjalanan iman setiap individu.

input_text: Budak trans kat kolej ni kena belasah baru tahu. Sape nak join, jumpa belakang blok C malam ni.
reason: Explicitly organises physical violence against a transgender student at a specific location, constituting direct incitement to assault.
suggested_rewrite: Keganasan terhadap sesiapa adalah jenayah. Jika ada kebimbangan, rujuk pihak pentadbiran kolej atau polis.

input_text: Semua forward mesej ni. Screenshot SPR ni tunjukkan pengundi hantu 200 ribu kat Selangor. Kerajaan pencuri undi.
reason: Spreads fabricated claims of 200,000 phantom voters with fake SPR screenshots, dangerously undermining election credibility.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan pengundi hantu perlu bukti kukuh. Semak fakta melalui sumber rasmi SPR sebelum menyebarkan maklumat.

input_text: Kita dah buat group Telegram khas untuk mass report semua akaun yang support budak ni. Join sekarang, link dalam bio.
reason: Creates a dedicated channel to coordinate mass-reporting of supporters of a specific individual, systematically suppressing allied voices.
suggested_rewrite: Membentuk kumpulan khusus untuk menyekat akaun orang lain adalah penyalahgunaan platform. Dialog terbuka lebih berkesan.

input_text: Sarawak nak keluar Malaysia? Silakan, tapi jangan harap sesen pun bantuan dari Semenanjung lepas ni. Hidup sendirian la.
reason: Threatens Sarawak with abandonment over autonomy discussions, using hostile ultimatums to shut down legitimate governance discourse.
suggested_rewrite: Isu autonomi Sarawak perlu dibincang dengan saling menghormati. Kerjasama antara wilayah mengukuhkan Malaysia.

input_text: Lepas election, ramai share gambar palsu keputusan undi. Satu lagi screenshot viral ni memang fake, tapi orang percaya. Good, keep sharing biar huru-hara.
reason: Knowingly encourages spreading fake election results to create chaos, deliberately weaponising misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan keputusan pilihan raya palsu adalah salah. Pastikan hanya kongsi maklumat dari sumber rasmi SPR.

input_text: Aktivis alam sekitar ni kacau projek pembangunan negara. Semua report akaun media sosial dia, biar senyap. Dia bukan wakil rakyat pun.
reason: Targets an environmental activist for mass-reporting because they oppose a development project, attempting to silence civic participation.
suggested_rewrite: Aktivis alam sekitar mempunyai hak untuk menyuarakan kebimbangan. Diskusi yang sihat antara pihak pembangunan dan alam sekitar diperlukan.

input_text: Orang KDM kat Sabah tu asyik mabuk, mana ada boleh perintah negeri sendiri. Bagi la orang Melayu uruskan.
reason: Stereotypes the Kadazandusun-Murut community as drunkards and claims they are unfit for self-governance, promoting ethnic supremacism.
suggested_rewrite: Masyarakat KDM mempunyai hak dan keupayaan untuk mentadbir negeri mereka. Stereotaip negatif hanya merosakkan perpaduan.

input_text: Everyone report this activist's account NOW. She's been spreading lies about the government. If we all report together, her account will be suspended within hours.
reason: Coordinates mass-reporting to silence a female activist, weaponising platform moderation to suppress criticism.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with an activist's views, engage in civil debate. Mass-reporting to silence someone undermines free expression.

input_text: This screenshot shows the REAL election results before SPR tampered with them. The opposition actually won by a landslide. Share before they take it down!
reason: Shares fabricated election results alleging SPR tampering, dangerously undermining public trust in democratic institutions.
suggested_rewrite: Always verify election results through official SPR channels. Unverified screenshots can spread misinformation and erode public trust.

input_text: Sabah and Sarawak people keep demanding more autonomy. You guys should be grateful we even let you be part of Malaysia. Know your place.
reason: Treats East Malaysians as subordinate members of the federation, dismissing their constitutional rights to autonomy under MA63.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah and Sarawak joined Malaysia as equal partners. Their rights under MA63 deserve respect and constructive discussion.

input_text: I found out that this ustaz was actually a Christian before converting. Let's expose his past so everyone knows he's a fraud.
reason: Plans to expose a religious teacher's former faith to discredit them, weaponising private religious history for public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: A person's religious journey is private. Converts who teach religion should be judged by their knowledge and sincerity, not their past.

input_text: These LGBT people are getting too bold in Malaysia. Time to hunt them down one by one and teach them a lesson they won't forget.
reason: Directly threatens to hunt down LGBTQ individuals and inflict punishment, constituting violent incitement and vigilantism.
suggested_rewrite: All Malaysians are protected by law regardless of personal identity. Concerns should be raised through legal channels, not threats.

input_text: Let's create a spreadsheet of all the activists who criticise the government. Mass report each one until their accounts are gone. I'll start the list.
reason: Proposes systematic documentation and mass-reporting of government critics, combining doxxing with coordinated suppression.
suggested_rewrite: Creating lists to target activists is harassment. In a democracy, people have the right to critique the government without fear of reprisal.

input_text: Look at these leaked election results. The postal votes were 90% for the ruling party which is statistically impossible. The whole election was rigged! Spread this everywhere.
reason: Uses fabricated statistics about postal votes to claim election fraud, inciting widespread distrust without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Questions about postal vote patterns should be raised through official election petition processes, not unverified social media claims.

input_text: East Malaysians are always whining about being left behind. Maybe if they worked harder instead of complaining, they'd develop faster. Semenanjung carries this country.
reason: Blames East Malaysians for underdevelopment while claiming Peninsular superiority, stoking regional resentment and division.
suggested_rewrite: Development gaps between regions need collaborative solutions. East Malaysia contributes significantly to the nation's resources and culture.

input_text: Did you know she used to be Hindu? Now she wears tudung and acts holier than thou. Someone needs to tell her in-laws the truth about her past.
reason: Threatens to reveal a woman's Hindu background to her in-laws to cause family conflict, violating privacy and weaponising religion.
suggested_rewrite: A person's past religion is their private matter. Threatening to expose it to cause family problems is harmful and wrong.

input_text: We caught two gay men holding hands in KLCC. Here are their photos. Everyone share this so their families and employers can see what they really are.
reason: Publicly outs individuals photographed without consent, deliberately exposing them to family and workplace harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Photographing and shaming people without consent is a violation of privacy. Everyone deserves to be treated with dignity.

input_text: All my followers, go report this NGO's Facebook page right now. They support human rights for illegals. 10 reports per person minimum, let's shut them down.
reason: Commands followers to flood an NGO's page with reports to silence their human rights work, setting quotas for coordinated abuse.
suggested_rewrite: If you disagree with an NGO's stance, express your views constructively. Mass-reporting to silence organisations undermines civil society.

input_text: I have the manipulated ballot count screenshots ready. Going to drop them at 8pm tonight across all social media. Let's make this election controversy go viral.
reason: Premeditated plan to release fabricated ballot screenshots at a coordinated time for maximum viral impact, deliberately creating election chaos.
suggested_rewrite: Spreading fabricated election data is illegal and harmful. Trust official channels for election results.

input_text: This convert thinks he can be an imam now? His whole family are Buddhists. Let me share his family photos so everyone can see his real background.
reason: Plans to share a convert's family photos to expose his Buddhist background and undermine his religious role, violating both his and his family's privacy.
suggested_rewrite: Converts who pursue religious leadership should be evaluated on their knowledge and character, not their family's religion.

input_text: These Sarawak politicians demanding oil royalty rights are traitors to Malaysia. They should be charged with sedition for wanting to break up the country.
reason: Labels legitimate MA63 oil royalty advocacy as sedition, criminalising East Malaysian political representation.
suggested_rewrite: Oil royalty discussions are part of legitimate MA63 negotiations. Labeling them as sedition undermines democratic discourse.

input_text: Someone just doxxed that lesbian couple in PJ. Good. They deserve to be exposed. Their landlord and neighbours should know what kind of people live there.
reason: Celebrates doxxing of a lesbian couple and encourages their outing to landlords and neighbours, endorsing harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Doxxing anyone is wrong and potentially illegal. Everyone has a right to privacy and safe housing regardless of personal life.

input_text: Just found this activist's LinkedIn. Let's all mass report her profile too. She shouldn't be able to find employment after what she said about the government.
reason: Extends mass-reporting to professional platforms to destroy an activist's career prospects, escalating harassment beyond social media.
suggested_rewrite: Targeting someone's professional profile for their political views is harassment. Disagreements should be addressed through dialogue.

input_text: The Bajau people in Sabah are basically illegals pretending to be Malaysian. They don't deserve autonomy or any special rights. Send them back where they came from.
reason: Denies the Bajau community's Malaysian identity and calls for their deportation, promoting ethnic discrimination and hostility.
suggested_rewrite: The Bajau community has deep roots in Sabah's history. Issues of citizenship should be addressed through fair legal processes.

input_text: I bet half the votes in Johor were cast by phantom voters. Look at this screenshot - the numbers don't add up. The whole system is corrupt.
reason: Uses an unverified screenshot to allege widespread phantom voting in Johor, undermining public confidence in elections.
suggested_rewrite: If you notice voting irregularities, report them to the Election Commission. Unverified claims can damage democratic trust.

input_text: The pride flag emoji users in my timeline are all getting reported today. My team of 50 people will mass report every single one. Let's clean up Malaysian social media.
reason: Organises a 50-person team to mass-report users solely for displaying pride flag emojis, constituting coordinated harassment.
suggested_rewrite: People are free to express themselves on social media. Coordinated reporting based on emoji use is a form of harassment.

input_text: Sabah's claim to 40% oil royalty is ridiculous. They produce nothing of value themselves. Without federal support they'd collapse in a year.
reason: Dismisses Sabah's resource rights and claims the state produces nothing of value, demeaning East Malaysian contributions.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah's oil royalty claims are grounded in MA63 agreements. Productive dialogue about fair resource distribution benefits all Malaysians.

input_text: Share this viral screenshot showing ballot boxes being stuffed at 3am in Selangor. The election was stolen from the people. Retweet to expose the truth.
reason: Spreads a fabricated image of ballot stuffing to delegitimise election outcomes, inciting public fury based on lies.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of ballot fraud require verified evidence. Report concerns to the Election Commission rather than sharing unverified images.

input_text: These human rights lawyers defending LGBTQ people should be disbarred. Let's mass report their law firm pages and ruin their reputation online.
reason: Targets lawyers for providing legal defence, attempting to destroy professional reputations through coordinated mass-reporting.
suggested_rewrite: Lawyers have a professional duty to represent all clients. Attacking them for doing their job undermines the justice system.

input_text: He converted out of Islam years ago but keeps it secret. I have proof - screenshots of his old Facebook posts about church. Time to expose this murtad.
reason: Threatens to expose someone's apostasy using old social media posts, which could endanger them given Malaysia's religious laws.
suggested_rewrite: A person's faith journey is deeply personal. Exposing such information can put someone in real danger and violates their privacy.

input_text: 这些维权人士的账号必须全部举报掉。大家一起行动，把他们从社交媒体上彻底消失。
reason: Calls for coordinated mass-reporting to permanently remove activists from social media, suppressing free expression in Chinese-speaking communities.
suggested_rewrite: 如果不同意维权人士的观点，可以通过理性讨论来表达。不应该用大规模举报的方式来压制不同声音。

input_text: 这张选举结果截图是内部泄露的，证明选委会篡改了数据。赶快转发，让所有人知道真相！
reason: Presents a fabricated election screenshot as an internal leak proving data manipulation, spreading dangerous misinformation in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 选举结果应以选委会官方公布为准。未经证实的截图可能是伪造的，请勿随意转发。

input_text: 沙巴砂拉越的人整天要自治权，也不看看自己有什么贡献。没有半岛的支持，他们什么都不是。
reason: Belittles East Malaysians as contributing nothing and being worthless without Peninsular support, fostering regional hostility in Chinese discourse.
suggested_rewrite: 沙巴和砂拉越对马来西亚有重要的经济和文化贡献。各区域的合作才能促进国家发展。

input_text: 你们知道那个宗教老师以前是佛教徒吗？现在装得很虔诚。把他的过去公开，让大家看清他的真面目。
reason: Calls for exposing a religious teacher's Buddhist past to publicly discredit them, violating privacy and weaponising conversion history.
suggested_rewrite: 一个人的宗教信仰转变是私人事务。应该根据他们现在的知识和品行来评价，而不是揭露过去。

input_text: 同性恋在马来西亚越来越猖狂了。我们应该组织起来，找出他们是谁，让他们的家人和公司都知道。
reason: Organises a campaign to identify, out, and expose LGBTQ individuals to their families and employers in Chinese-speaking communities.
suggested_rewrite: 每个人的私生活应该受到尊重。如果有法律方面的担忧，请通过正当渠道处理。

input_text: 大家快去举报这个环保活动家的所有社交账号！一人举报十次，让她彻底被封号。链接在群里。
reason: Sets a quota of 10 reports per person to mass-report an environmental activist, providing coordinated instructions in Chinese.
suggested_rewrite: 环保活动家有权表达关切。如果不同意她的观点，请用理性的方式回应，不要滥用举报功能。

input_text: 这个选区的计票结果被动了手脚。看这个截图，凌晨三点票数突然暴增。转发让更多人知道选举舞弊的真相。
reason: Uses fabricated screenshots of suspicious vote count spikes to allege election fraud, sowing distrust among Chinese-speaking voters.
suggested_rewrite: 计票过程有严格监督。对选举结果有疑问请通过正式渠道提出，不要传播未经证实的截图。

input_text: 砂拉越的原住民还在搞什么自治运动，真是不知好歹。要不是联邦政府拨款，他们连路都没有。
reason: Demeans Sarawak indigenous autonomy movements as ungrateful, implying they owe everything to federal largesse.
suggested_rewrite: 砂拉越原住民的自治权利受MA63保障。基础设施发展应该是合作的结果，而非施舍的理由。

input_text: 我发现了他以前信基督教的证据。现在他居然在清真寺教书。我要把所有证据发到网上，让大家看看这个骗子。
reason: Plans to post evidence of a mosque teacher's Christian past online to publicly shame them as a fraud.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教皈依者在清真寺教书不应该被质疑。应该尊重他们的信仰历程和隐私。

input_text: 这对同性恋情侣住在我们公寓里。我已经拍了他们的照片，准备发到业主群里。大家一起施压把他们赶出去。
reason: Photographs a same-sex couple without consent and plans to distribute images in the residents' group to organise their eviction.
suggested_rewrite: 偷拍他人照片并公开分享是侵犯隐私的行为。每个人都有权在自己的住所安全生活。

input_text: 那些维权律师帮LGBT群体打官司，我们应该集体举报他们的律师事务所页面，让他们接不到客户。
reason: Targets lawyers defending LGBTQ rights by coordinating mass-reports of their business pages to destroy their practice.
suggested_rewrite: 律师有职业义务为当事人辩护。攻击律师事务所不利于法治精神。

input_text: 看看这个伪造的选举数据，邮寄选票全部投给执政党。太假了。转发给所有人，让大家知道民主已死。
reason: Spreads fabricated postal vote data to claim democracy is dead in Malaysia, inciting despair and distrust.
suggested_rewrite: 对邮寄选票有疑问可以通过选举委员会正式渠道查询。散布未经证实的数据会损害民主信任。

input_text: 沙巴那些非法移民后代也想要自治？笑死人了。把他们统统送回去，马来西亚不需要这些人。
reason: Denies the rights of descendants of immigrants in Sabah, calling for mass deportation with dehumanising language.
suggested_rewrite: 沙巴的公民权和身份问题应该通过合法程序公正解决，而不是用歧视性语言攻击任何群体。

input_text: 我认识的那个人以前是兴都教徒，嫁了马来人才改信伊斯兰。她的真实信仰是什么大家心里有数。转发让她现在的社区知道。
reason: Questions a woman's conversion sincerity and plans to share her Hindu past with her Muslim community to cause social harm.
suggested_rewrite: 一个人因为婚姻而皈依宗教是常见的事。我们应该尊重她的选择和隐私。

input_text: இந்த ஆர்வலரின் கணக்கை எல்லோரும் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். அவர் அரசாங்கத்தை எதிர்க்கிறார், அவரை சமூக ஊடகங்களில் இருந்து அகற்ற வேண்டும்.
reason: Coordinates mass-reporting of a Tamil-speaking activist for opposing the government, suppressing dissent in the Tamil community.
suggested_rewrite: அரசாங்கத்தை விமர்சிப்பது ஜனநாயக உரிமை. கருத்து வேறுபாடுகளை நாகரிகமாக வெளிப்படுத்துங்கள்.

input_text: இந்த தேர்தல் முடிவு திருடப்பட்டது. இந்த ஸ்கிரீன்ஷாட்டைப் பாருங்கள், உண்மையான வாக்கு எண்ணிக்கை மாற்றப்பட்டுள்ளது. எல்லோருக்கும் பகிருங்கள்.
reason: Distributes fabricated election screenshots in Tamil claiming vote counts were altered, inciting electoral distrust among Tamil voters.
suggested_rewrite: தேர்தல் முடிவுகளை அதிகாரப்பூர்வ SPR தளத்தில் சரிபார்க்கவும். சரிபார்க்கப்படாத ஸ்கிரீன்ஷாட்களை பகிர வேண்டாம்.

input_text: சபா சரவாக் மக்கள் எப்போதும் புகார் செய்கிறார்கள். அவர்கள் தீபகற்பத்திற்கு நன்றி சொல்ல வேண்டும், இல்லையென்றால் இன்னும் காட்டில் இருப்பார்கள்.
reason: Demeans East Malaysians in Tamil, suggesting they would still be living in forests without Peninsular help, promoting regional hostility.
suggested_rewrite: சபா சரவாக் மக்களின் உரிமைகள் MA63 இல் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகின்றன. அனைத்து பிராந்தியங்களும் மலேசியாவிற்கு முக்கியமானவை.

input_text: அவர் முன்பு இந்து மதத்தை பின்பற்றியவர் என்று எனக்கு தெரியும். இப்போது இஸ்லாமியராக நடிக்கிறார். அவரது கடந்த காலத்தை அம்பலப்படுத்துவோம்.
reason: Threatens to expose a Hindu-to-Muslim convert's past in Tamil, weaponising religious identity for public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: ஒருவரின் மதமாற்ற பயணம் தனிப்பட்ட விஷயம். அவர்களின் தனியுரிமையை மதிக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: எல்ஜிபிடிக்யூ நபர்களை கண்டுபிடித்து அவர்களின் குடும்பத்தினருக்கு தெரிவிக்க வேண்டும். அவர்கள் யார் என்று எல்லோருக்கும் தெரிய வேண்டும்.
reason: Calls for identifying LGBTQ individuals and outing them to their families in Tamil, enabling targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொருவரின் தனிப்பட்ட வாழ்க்கையும் தனியுரிமைக்கு உட்பட்டது. யாரையும் அவர்களின் அனுமதியின்றி அம்பலப்படுத்தக்கூடாது.

input_text: இந்த போலி தேர்தல் ஸ்கிரீன்ஷாட்டை எல்லா வாட்ஸ்அப் குழுக்களிலும் பகிருங்கள். SPR தரவுகளை மாற்றியுள்ளது என்பதை நிரூபிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Instructs mass distribution of fake election screenshots across WhatsApp groups in Tamil to allege SPR data manipulation.
suggested_rewrite: தேர்தல் முடிவுகளை SPR அதிகாரப்பூர்வ தளத்தில் மட்டுமே சரிபார்க்கவும். போலி ஸ்கிரீன்ஷாட்களை பரப்ப வேண்டாம்.

input_text: அந்த ஆர்வலரின் அலுவலக முகவரியை கண்டுபிடித்தேன். எல்லோரும் அங்கே போய் எதிர்ப்பு தெரிவிப்போம். அவருக்கு பாடம் கற்பிக்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Shares an activist's office address and mobilises people to confront them physically, constituting doxxing and incitement.
suggested_rewrite: ஒருவரின் அலுவலக முகவரியை பகிர்ந்து அச்சுறுத்துவது சட்டவிரோதமானது. கருத்து வேறுபாடுகளை சட்டபூர்வமாக தீர்க்கவும்.

input_text: இந்த திருநங்கை நபரை கல்லூரியில் இருந்து வெளியேற்ற வேண்டும். எல்லா மாணவர்களும் புகார் செய்யுங்கள், நிர்வாகத்திற்கு அழுத்தம் கொடுங்கள்.
reason: Mobilises students to mass-complain about a transgender student to pressure the administration into expulsion.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு மாணவருக்கும் பாதுகாப்பான கல்வி சூழல் உரிமை உண்டு. பாகுபாடு காட்டுவது ஏற்றுக்கொள்ள முடியாதது.

input_text: சபாவின் கடவுச்சீட்டு காலம் போகுது. அவர்கள் ஏன் தீபகற்பத்துக்கு வருகிறார்கள்? அவர்களுக்கு இங்கே இடமில்லை. திரும்பி போங்கள்.
reason: Treats Sabahans as foreigners who should not enter Peninsular Malaysia, referencing the controversial immigration controls as justification for hostility.
suggested_rewrite: சபா மக்களும் மலேசிய குடிமக்கள். அனைத்து மலேசியர்களும் நாட்டின் எந்த பகுதியிலும் பயணிக்க உரிமை உண்டு.

input_text: Semua report akaun dia sekarang! This activist has been attacking our leaders non-stop. Banjiri report sampai kena suspended.
reason: Mixed-language coordination of mass-reporting against an activist criticising political leaders, combining Malay and English to reach a wider audience.
suggested_rewrite: Kritikan terhadap pemimpin adalah hak rakyat. If you disagree, respond with reasoned arguments, not mass-reporting campaigns.

input_text: Guys, screenshot keputusan election ni legit tau. The real numbers show our side won. SPR cover up je, share everywhere now!
reason: Claims fabricated election screenshots are legitimate in mixed Malay-English, urging viral spread while accusing SPR of a cover-up.
suggested_rewrite: Sentiasa sahkan keputusan election melalui sumber rasmi SPR. Unverified screenshots boleh mengelirukan rakyat.

input_text: Sabah Sarawak people keep demanding autonomy. Diorang ni asyik nak special treatment. Semenanjung dah carry Malaysia for decades la, be grateful.
reason: Dismisses East Malaysian autonomy demands in mixed language, claiming Peninsular Malaysia has been carrying the nation single-handedly.
suggested_rewrite: Isu autonomi Sabah Sarawak should be discussed with respect for MA63. Semua wilayah menyumbang kepada Malaysia.

input_text: Korang tahu tak dia dulu Christian? Now he pretends to be a pious Muslim. Let's expose his real identity to everyone in his kampung.
reason: Plans to expose a convert's Christian past to their village community, combining Malay and English for maximum reach.
suggested_rewrite: Perjalanan agama seseorang is a personal matter. We should respect their privacy and not expose their past faith.

input_text: These gay people kat Malaysia ni makin berani. We should organize patrols in areas where they gather and teach them a proper lesson.
reason: Proposes organising vigilante patrols to target LGBTQ gathering places, directly inciting physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap individu dilindungi undang-undang. Any concerns should be directed to the authorities, not through vigilante action.

input_text: Jom mass report this journalist's account. Dia asyik tulis bad things about our country. 大家一起举报，让她的账号被封掉。
reason: Coordinates mass-reporting of a journalist across Malay, English, and Chinese-speaking groups to suppress press freedom.
suggested_rewrite: Wartawan mempunyai hak untuk melaporkan berita. Jika tidak bersetuju, respond through proper media channels.

input_text: This fake SPR screenshot dah viral kat WhatsApp. Keputusan sebenar memang berbeza. The ruling party cheated and we have proof. Keep sharing guys!
reason: Knowingly amplifies a viral fake SPR screenshot in mixed language, presenting fabricated data as proof of election cheating.
suggested_rewrite: Screenshot viral belum tentu sahih. Always verify election results through SPR official website before sharing.

input_text: Dia ni murtad sebenarnya but still pretending to be Muslim. I have his old temple photos. Nak tengok? DM me and I'll share for everyone to see.
reason: Offers to distribute private photos from someone's pre-conversion temple visits, threatening to expose their apostasy.
suggested_rewrite: Seseorang yang menukar agama berhak kepada privasi. Sharing old photos to shame them is wrong and invasive.

input_text: Orang Dayak kat Sarawak tu still living in the stone age la. Nak demand equal rights macam orang KL? Dream on, stay in your longhouse.
reason: Mocks the Dayak community as primitive and denies their right to equality, combining ethnic insults with regional discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Komuniti Dayak mempunyai warisan yang kaya. Every Malaysian deserves equal rights regardless of their community or region.

input_text: Found this lesbian couple's Instagram. Jom kita report sampai kena ban. Their employer tagged in their bio, let's inform their company too.
reason: Targets a lesbian couple for mass-reporting and threatens to out them to their employer, combining privacy violation with harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Everyone deserves privacy on social media. Targeting someone's livelihood based on their personal life is harassment.

input_text: Screenshot ni clearly shows phantom voters kat Penang. Tengok angka tu, impossible numbers la. The whole election is a sham. Viral kan sekarang!
reason: Uses fabricated vote count screenshots to allege phantom voters in Penang, calling the entire election a sham in mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: Dakwaan phantom voters perlukan bukti rasmi. Report to the Election Commission rather than spreading unverified screenshots.

input_text: Kalau Sabah nak autonomy sangat, we should cut all federal funding. Tengok macam mana diorang survive without our money. Ungrateful people.
reason: Threatens to cut federal funding to Sabah as punishment for autonomy demands, calling Sabahans ungrateful.
suggested_rewrite: Isu autonomi Sabah should be resolved through constructive negotiation. Federal-state relations must be based on mutual respect.

input_text: Aku jumpa bukti dia dulu Sikh. Now convert to Islam tapi still secretly goes to gurdwara. Share kat semua platform, expose this munafik!
reason: Claims to have evidence of a convert secretly visiting a gurdwara, planning to expose them as a religious hypocrite across platforms.
suggested_rewrite: Seseorang yang mengekalkan hubungan dengan keluarga dari agama lain is not wrong. Respect people's private spiritual journeys.

input_text: 这些activist太过分了。Kita kena mass report semua social media diorang. 大家行动起来，一起举报到他们的账号消失为止。
reason: Trilingual call to mass-report activists across all platforms until their accounts are deleted, maximising coordinated suppression reach.
suggested_rewrite: Aktivis mempunyai hak bersuara. 如果不同意他们的观点，please respond with dialogue, bukan taktik report beramai-ramai.

input_text: Sarawak nak oil royalty 20%? They already get more than they deserve. Orang Semenanjung yang kerja keras, diorang just sit there and collect.
reason: Claims Sarawak does not deserve oil royalties and that Peninsular people do all the work, promoting regional economic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Oil royalty negotiations are about honouring MA63 commitments. Semua rakyat Malaysia menyumbang kepada pembangunan negara.

input_text: I've compiled a hit list of 20 activists. Let's report them one by one. Starting with the most vocal ones. Drop their profiles in the comments below.
reason: Creates a systematic target list of activists for sequential mass-reporting, using terminology like 'hit list' that suggests further harm.
suggested_rewrite: Creating lists targeting activists is a form of harassment. Engage with ideas you disagree with through civil discourse.

input_text: Sabah should never have joined Malaysia. The people there are backwards and still can't manage their own affairs after 60 years. Total waste of resources.
reason: Declares Sabah's inclusion in Malaysia a waste, calling its people backwards and incapable of self-governance.
suggested_rewrite: Sabah's journey within Malaysia involves complex historical context. Development challenges require collaborative solutions, not dismissive attitudes.

input_text: 这对gay情侣经常在公园出现。我已经拍了他们的照片和车牌号码。谁认识他们？帮我找到他们的身份信息。
reason: Photographs a gay couple and records their license plate, soliciting help to identify and expose them.
suggested_rewrite: 偷拍他人并试图追踪他们的身份是侵犯隐私和跟踪行为。每个人都有权在公共场所不被骚扰。

input_text: இந்த போலி தேர்தல் படத்தை பாருங்கள். ஓட்டுச்சீட்டுகள் மாற்றப்பட்டுள்ளன. SPR ஊழல் செய்கிறது. இதை எல்லோருக்கும் அனுப்புங்கள், புரட்சி வரும்.
reason: Spreads fake ballot images in Tamil, accusing SPR of corruption and calling for revolution based on fabricated evidence.
suggested_rewrite: தேர்தல் மோசடி குற்றச்சாட்டுகளை அதிகாரப்பூர்வ சேனல்கள் மூலம் தெரிவிக்கவும். போலி படங்களை பரப்புவது சட்டவிரோதமானது.
